message:
fix(fcp-sandbox): resolve symlink escape in file-access policy checks for non-existent paths

Replace bare path.canonicalize() fallback with resolve_policy_path()
that canonicalizes the nearest existing ancestor and appends the
unresolved suffix, preventing symlink+".." traversal past writable
path boundaries when the leaf path does not yet exist.

Add normalize_path() for lexical resolution without filesystem access.
Update all three platform backends (Linux, macOS, Windows) to use the
new resolver. Add safe u16 conversions for seccomp filter lengths and
Windows job memory/CPU limits to prevent silent truncation.

Includes two symlink escape regression tests that verify the fix
against both direct symlink targets and parent-traversal attacks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
